subject: Discussion on Contract Renewal Concerns
body_paragraphs: I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to reach out regarding the ongoing negotiations for the upcoming contract renewal with Meridian Logistics. We have encountered some challenges as the executive team has raised specific pricing objections along with a set of service concerns that remain unaddressed. As a result, the CFO has withheld sign-off, which is causing a delay in our discussions.

To move forward effectively, it is crucial for us to have a clear, itemized view of the current blockers and the proposed remediation steps. This will help us address the concerns raised by the executive team and facilitate a smoother negotiation process. I suggest we schedule a meeting to discuss these points in detail and outline a path forward before the renewal date approaches.
